heading: Service of process
label: 152110 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15211036:4109., , .Nov. 14, 1988Pub. L. 100–655, § 109102 Stat. 3851The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
